reference_answer: The prerequisites for DS201 (Data Structures) are: CS101 (Programming Fundamentals) and Math 101 (Discrete Mathematics). Students must have completed both courses with a minimum grade of C before enrolling in DS201.
Registration for the upcoming semester closes on August 15th, 2025 at 5:00 PM. Late registration is available from August 16-20 with a late fee of $50.

query: What is the minimum attendance requirement?
reference_answer: The university requires a minimum of 75% attendance in all registered courses. Students below this threshold may face detention and will not be allowed to appear for final exams.

query: How do I apply for hostel accommodation?
reference_answer: To apply for hostel accommodation: 1) Log into the student portal, 2) Navigate to Services > Hostel Application, 3) Fill the online form with room preferences, 4) Upload required documents (ID proof, medical certificate), 5) Pay the advance fee of $500. Applications are processed on a first-come-first-served basis.
The Central Library is open Monday-Friday from 8:00 AM to 10:00 PM, and on weekends from 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM. During exam period (last 2 weeks of semester), the library operates 24/7.
